title: Consistent Recovery Compass
description: Changes the recovery compass texture to match the compass!
body:
<center>
  
![Consistent Recovery Compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XbdWNQyE/images/15802f368d0b9c988424c8bbbbb88348c2e935e5.png)
## Consistent Recovery Compass
**By Lobby**

Consistent Recovery Compass is a simple drag-and-drop resource pack that changes the recovery compass texture to match the style of the compass.

Also check out [Consistent Compass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/compass), which does the complete opposite of this resource pack, instead changing the compass texture to match the style of the recovery compass!
